Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technolo.note: KIITEE is for a single institute (KIIT, Bhubaneswar). getmyuni publishes course-wise KIITEE closing ranks (General). UG management courses: BBA, BCA, B.Com, B.Sc(CS), years 2019-2020. KIIT does not publish recent (2024/25) cutoffs.

Karnataka Bachelor of Business Administr.note: No dedicated Karnataka BBA entrance with rank/cutoff data exists. KEA does not conduct a BBA-specific entrance; competitor pages (shiksha/careers360/collegedekho) list BBA colleges with fees/eligibility but no college-wise opening/closing ranks tied to this exam. KMAT (the nearest Karnataka management exam) is for MBA/PGDM, not BBA.

Kashmir Polytechnic Entrance.note: JKBOTE/JKBOPEE publish only provisional selection / merit lists (candidate names & roll numbers), not college-and-branch-wise opening/closing ranks or cutoff scores. careers360 JKPET article has only eligibility/reservation %, no cutoff rows.

Kerala Nursing Entrance Examination.note: Official LBS Centre 'Last Index Mark' PDF (Professional Degree in Nursing & Paramedical 2023-24, after regular allotment). College-wise closing index marks (out of 300) per category for B.Sc Nursing across govt/SIMET/CPAS/self-financing colleges. Values are cutoff index marks (score), not ranks. Capped to 300 rows; Open/SC/ST/EWS categories.

Kerala Polytechnic Entrance Examination.note: Kerala Polytechnic college/branch-wise last index ranks exist but are behind a login-gated dialog on polyadmission.org (requires application number; portal returns 500/login). Public articles (careers360/sarvgyan/collegedekho) only describe the process and link to the gated tool, with no static rank table.
